title: lupinus arizonicus subsp. arizonicus
intro: Lupinus arizonicus subsp. arizonicus, commonly known as Arizona lupine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lupin family (Fabaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Arizona lupine are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Lupinus arizonicus subsp. arizonicus can be prepared into various herbal supplements, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
